name: NeuroDash AI
description: An AI bot for Geometry Dash 2.2 that trains itself using Reinforcement Learning and Genetic Neuroevolution, complete with a real-time neural network graph overlay!

ai-enabled.name: Enable AI Control
ai-enabled.description: When enabled, the AI bot takes over and learns to play the level. Disabling this returns control to you.

population-size.name: Generation Population Size
population-size.description: How many 'brains' (networks) are evaluated per generation. Larger sizes learn more thoroughly but take longer per generation.

mutation-rate.name: Mutation Probability
mutation-rate.description: The chance (0.0 to 1.0) that each neural connection is mutated during evolution.
